title: Defensive AI Security Resources
description: Papers, tools, frameworks, and communities for teams building guardrails, monitoring, and safety controls into AI systems.

items.title: Constitutional AI: Harmlessness from AI Feedback
NeMo Guardrails: A Toolkit for Controllable and Safe LLM Applications
Baseline Defenses for Adversarial Attacks Against Aligned Language Models
Detecting Language Model Attacks with Perplexity
NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF)
EU AI Act — High-Risk System Requirements
Guardrails AI
items.description: Python framework for adding structural and semantic validation to LLM outputs.

items.title: NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails
items.description: Programmable guardrails for LLM-based apps with Colang DSL.

items.title: Lakera Guard
items.description: Real-time LLM security API for detecting prompt injection and harmful content.

items.title: Protect AI
items.description: AI security platform covering model scanning, supply chain, and runtime protection.

items.title: Presidio (Microsoft)
items.description: PII detection and anonymization library for LLM pipelines.

items.title: LlamaIndex — Security Best Practices
items.description: RAG framework with access-control patterns and retrieval safeguards.

items.title: rebuff
items.description: Open-source prompt injection detector using layered heuristics and LLM-based checks.

items.title: LLM-Guard
items.description: Input/output scanner suite for common LLM security risks.

items.title: DEF CON AI Village Talks (YouTube)
items.description: Presentations on AI security including red-teaming, defenses, and policy.

items.title: USENIX Security AI Track
items.description: Peer-reviewed research on AI and ML security, with talk recordings.

items.title: AI Safety Fundamentals (BlueDot)
items.description: Free curriculum on technical AI safety including alignment and interpretability.

items.title: GIAC Machine Learning Security (GMLS)
items.description: GIAC certification covering ML security, threat modeling, and defense strategies.

items.title: EC-Council Certified AI Security Practitioner
items.description: Practical AI security certification covering LLM attacks and defensive controls.

items.title: Secure AI Engineer (Pluralsight)
items.description: Courses on building secure AI applications and detecting ML vulnerabilities.

items.title: MLSecOps Community
items.description: Practitioners securing ML pipelines, model registries, and LLM deployments.

items.title: OWASP AI Security and Privacy Guide
items.description: OWASP working group on AI security best practices and guidance.

items.title: AI Risk and Governance Forum
items.description: Multi-stakeholder body producing AI safety and governance guidelines.

items.title: HuggingFace Safety Team
items.description: Open-source safety evaluations and bias benchmarks for transformer models.
